feat.name: Leading Dance
feat.text: You sweep your foe into your dance. Attempt a Performance check against an adjacent enemy's Will DC.

traits.name: Bravado
traits.text: Actions with this trait can grant panache, depending on the result of the check involved. If you succeed at the check on a bravado action, you gain panache, and if you fail (but not critically fail) the check, you gain panache but only until the end of your next turn. These effects can be applied even if the action had no other effect due to a failure or a creature's immunity.

traits.name: Move
traits.text: An action with this trait involves moving from one space to another.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.

feat.requirement: You are adjacent to an enemy.
feat.critical_success: Your foe is swept up in your dance. You both move up to 10 feet in the same direction, remaining adjacent to one another. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions from the target (and the target's movement doesn't trigger reactions because it's forced movement).
feat.success: As critical success, but you both move only 5 feet.
feat.failure: The foe doesn't follow your steps. You can move 5 feet if you choose, but this movement triggers reactions normally.
feat.critical_failure: You stumble, falling prone in your space.
